title: senecio kjellmanii
intro: Senecio kjellmanii, also known as Kjellman's ragwort or Arctic fireweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Arctic tundra. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio kjellmanii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
